eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 02:23 AM ON MAY 23, 2026 Effective until 02:38 AM MAY 24, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THE FERGUSON POLICE DEPARTMENT HAS ISSUED AN AMBER ALERT FOR A CHILD ABDUCTION THAT OCCURRED AT 9701 PERCH DRIVE ,  FERGUSON, MISSOURI ON 05/23/2026 AT 01:20 AM.  

ABDUCTED WAS SYMERE MURRAY, BLACK, FEMALE, AGE 4 MONTH(S). 

SUSPECT VEHICLE IS A GRAY VEHICLE. 

SUSPECT IS ARMANI CINCER ROBINSON-MCKENZIE A BLACK, MALE, 22, 6 FEET 2 INCHES TALL, 175 POUNDS, HAS BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. 
LAST SEEN WEARING A GRAY CARHART BASEBALL HAT, LONG SLEEVE WHITE SHIRT, BLUE JEANS, AND BLACK BALENCIAGA TENNIS SHOES. 
SUSPECT WEARS A NOSE RING. 

VICTIM SYMERE MURRAY IS 2 FEET 0 INCHES TALL, 15 POUNDS, HAS BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. 
LAST SEEN A WEARING PINK MINNIE MOUSE SHIRT AND PINK PANTS. 

SUSPECT ABDUCTED THE CHILD AFTER ASSAULTING THE MOTHER. ALERT ISSUED TO TROOP C REGION. . 

PLEASE CALL 9 1 1 OR FERGUSON POLICE DEPARTMENT AT 636-529-8220 IF YOU HAVE ANY INFORMATION PERTAINING TO THIS ALERT.
